nasb.text: There were others who said, “We are mortgaging our fields, our vineyards and our houses that we might get grain because of the famine.”

esv.text: There were also those who said, “We are mortgaging our fields, our vineyards, and our houses to get grain because of the famine.”

cnv.text: 有些人說：“我們抵押了自己的田地、葡萄園和房屋，為要在饑荒中買到五穀。”

ccb.text: 有的说：“因为饥荒的缘故，我们要将田地、葡萄园和房屋作抵押来获取粮食。”
